creator: raimeetravel
caption:
A reminder that you can do things however you want!!! I just wrapped up a great weekend trip in the Pacific Northwest to celebrate one of my longest friends, and it was a much needed girls trip! 

What are your thoughts on bachelorette parties and destination weddings? I love traveling for them but they can definitely get really pricey!! 

#bacheloretteparty #girlstrip #bachparty #liminalspaces

transcription.text: i am currently on maybe the most unconventional bachelorette party weekend so i thought it'd be fun to show you everything we do. my best friend megan really wanted to do something unique for this weekend with four of her best friends who live all over the world. she also didn't want it to cost us a ton of money or put pressure on us to buy a bunch of stuff we'd only wear or use once and she has some pretty niche interests so this was our first stop. where are we? the last blockbuster in the world! she loves all things nostalgia and also liminal spaces and back rooms which i'm not really familiar with but this last blockbuster was so cool to see. we just drove past an alpaca farm and this wasn't planned but this is one of her favorite animals we happened to stumble upon. are you kidding me? they're so cute. this was so peaceful. literally crying. and i know to many people this might not look like an ideal bachelorette party. we didn't drink, we didn't really go out at all, we also went thrift shopping at this great place in downtown portland. there were no theme nights or anything like that which i love that stuff but getting away and relaxing with a group of girls with no pressure to really do anything was so healing so i really loved this trip even though it was a little different.
